title: La Ronde
writer: Arthur Schnitzler, Jacques Natanson, Max Ophüls
actors: Anton Walbrook, Simone Signoret, Serge Reggiani
plot: Soldiers, chambermaids, poets, prostitutes, aristocrats-all are on equal footing in this multi-character merry-go-round of love and infidelity.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 3 wins & 3 nominations total
